description: NFL 2-way moneyline (Eagles/Chiefs); slug==event-slug market; away_home order.

espn.name: Philadelphia Eagles at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The goal for the Philadelphia Eagles is to be playing their best at the end of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eagles' defense shines in Super Bowl rematch as Philly beats the Chiefs 20-17 at Arrowhead Stadium

polymarket.title: Eagles vs. Chiefs
polymarket.description:
In the upcoming NFL game, scheduled for September 14 at 4:25PM ET:
If the Philadelphia Eagles win, the market will resolve to “Eagles”.
If the Kansas City Chiefs win, the market will resolve to “Chiefs”.
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Spread: Eagles (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming NFL game, scheduled for September 14 at 4:25 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Eagles" if the Eagles win the game by 2 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Chiefs". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Chiefs".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Eagles vs. Chiefs: O/U 44.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NFL game, scheduled for September 14 at 4:25 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Eagles and Chiefs combine to score 45 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 45, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
